title: Receptionist CV Template UK — Front Desk & Office

cv.name: Priya Nair
cv.title: Receptionist
cv.summary: Welcoming receptionist with 4 years managing busy UK corporate and clinic front desks. Experienced in visitor sign-in, switchboard operation, room bookings, and delivering a professional first impression for 100+ daily visitors.

bullets: Greeted 120+ patients daily while managing appointments and enquiries
Maintained GDPR-compliant sign-in procedures with zero data breaches
Coordinated courier deliveries and meeting room schedules for 20 staff
Handled check-ins, billing, and guest complaints with 4.8/5 review scores
Managed night audit handovers and cash reconciliation accurately
